hero.title: Turning bad ideas into joyful experiences
hero.lead: Bad Idea Interactive is an indie studio turning "bad ideas" into joyful arcade experiences with a twist... and learning apps.
hero.p1: Founded by an industry veteran, the studio blends classic game feel with modern production discipline: clear scope, tight feedback loops and a ruthless focus on player experience.
hero.p2: Every project is an excuse to explore new mechanics, teach something useful, or simply make people smile for a few minutes.
hero.care2: 🧠 Clear, teachable systems and readable design
hero.care3: 🌍 Local flavor & cultural references that feel personal
hero.care4: 🔁 Small, replayable experiences with strong game feel
team.title: Core Contributors
team.subtitle: The minds (and paws) behind Bad Idea Interactive.
team.david.bio: Product leader and game developer with 15+ years of experience across localization, agile delivery and digital products. Passionate about clarity, systems thinking, and building tools that actually help teams move forward.
team.pepper.bio: Oversees strategic naps, office security patrols, and morale optimization. Specializes in quality assurance through intense staring and keyboard supervision.
offerings.title: Work With Us
offerings.lead: Beyond games and apps, we help studios and small businesses build the infrastructure and presence behind their products.
offerings.consulting.title: Games Studio Consulting
offerings.consulting.desc: Pipelines, localization foundations and production process for studios scaling past the prototype stage.
offerings.web.title: Web & Online Presence
offerings.web.desc: Websites, SEO and ongoing content and social presence for studios and small businesses that need to show up online.
games.title: Games
games.lead: Small, focused arcade experiences built with a production mindset and a lot of Christmas lights.
games.mayor.title: Mayor Saves Christmas
games.mayor.desc: A fast-paced arcade platformer set in Vigo. Trap enemies, juggle combos and save the city's legendary Christmas lights. Campaign and endless mode.
games.escape.title: Escape From Hell
games.escape.desc: A score-chasing prototype exploring tight movement, pressure, and one more run pacing in a compact arena.
games.secret.title: Unannounced Project
games.secret.desc: A new experiment mixing arcade readability, learning elements, and small-session play. More details coming soon.
apps.title: Apps
apps.lead: Small, focused tools built with the same care as our games — designed to make learning and daily habits feel more playful.
apps.mandarin.title: Mandarin Daily
apps.mandarin.desc: A focused flashcard app for Mandarin learners, mixing HSK vocabulary, example sentences and spaced repetition into short, daily sessions.
apps.tools.title: Studio Tools
apps.tools.desc: Internal tools and small utilities to streamline production, prototyping, and playtesting — some of which may be released publicly.
apps.reward.title: Random Reward Generator
apps.reward.desc: A tool allowing you to enter a list of names and a list of rewards, and it randomly assigns each reward to one of the participants.
apps.locflow.title: LocFlow
apps.locflow.desc: A localization pipeline that extracts content, formats it for any workflow — AI-assisted, human translation, or both — and handles vendor delivery and re-import. Adapts to how your team works.
locflow.hero.title: LocFlow — localization, your way.
locflow.hero.subtext: A pipeline that handles extraction, formatting, delivery and re-import — and plugs in AI translation, your own LLM, or a human vendor at whichever stage makes sense for your project.
locflow.features.title: What it does
locflow.features.lead: LocFlow manages the full localization lifecycle, scaled to your business needs.
locflow.features.li1: Extract strings from source files (JSON, PO, XLIFF, and custom formats)
locflow.features.li2: Format and package content for vendor delivery or automated processing
locflow.features.li3: Optional AI translation via GPT, Claude, or a custom LLM of your choice
locflow.features.li4: QA checks and glossary enforcement at any stage of the pipeline
locflow.features.li5: Re-import translated content back into your source system
locflow.features.li6: Configurable per project: fully automated, AI-assisted, or human-only
locflow.process.title: How it works
locflow.process.step1.title: Extract & format
locflow.process.step1.desc: The system tracks changes in the source language files. Source content is then parsed, cleaned and packaged into the target format for your workflow.
locflow.process.step2.title: Route & translate
locflow.process.step2.desc: Content is routed to an AI model, an external vendor, or both — based on your project configuration.
locflow.process.step3.title: Deliver & re-import
locflow.process.step3.desc: Translated files are delivered in the correct format and re-imported into the source system.
locflow.stack.title: Built to be swappable
locflow.stack.desc: Python, javascript and N8N-based pipeline with LLM support. The model layer is configurable — point it at your own LLM endpoint or bypass AI entirely and route straight to your translation vendor. No lock-in at any stage.
locflow.cta.title: Need a localization pipeline that fits how your team works?
locflow.cta.desc: LocFlow is in active development. Implementation is customized based on every project's unique requirements. If you're interested in an early version or a custom setup, let's talk.
cta.title: Got a project in mind?
cta.desc: Whether you need a collaborator, a consultant or just a fresh perspective — let's talk.
footer.tagline: Indie studio turning "bad ideas" into focused arcade games, learning tools and playful experiments.
consulting.hero.title: Most studios don't struggle at making games. They struggle at the infrastructure around them.
consulting.hero.subtext: I help indie and mid-size studios build the pipelines, processes and localization foundations they need to go global without chaos.
consulting.hero.langs: 🌍 Available in EN · ES · FR · PT
consulting.hero.bring1: 🎮 15+ years in games and digital product delivery
consulting.hero.bring3: ⚙️ Agile transformation, localization production, and AI automation
consulting.hero.bring4: 🤝 One point of contact, from audit to implementation
consulting.services.title: What I do
consulting.services.lead: Three focused services. Each starts with a free 15-minute discovery call.
consulting.services.whatinpractice: What could this mean in practice:
consulting.services.loc.title: Localization Production
consulting.services.loc.desc: Localization bolted on at the end costs twice as much and breaks things you didn't expect. I help studios build the right foundations early — terminology, workflows, tools, file formats, vendor relationships — so going global doesn't mean starting over.
consulting.services.loc.li4: Style guides, glossaries, and QA process
consulting.services.pm.title: PM & Workflow Consulting
consulting.services.pm.desc: Unclear processes, the wrong tools, or no structure at all. These are solvable problems. I assess what you have, identify what's slowing you down, and set up a methodology and toolstack that actually fits how your team works.
consulting.services.pm.li3: Tool setup and team onboarding (Jira, Notion, ClickUp...)
consulting.services.pm.li4: KPIs, reporting templates, and ceremony structure
consulting.services.ai.title: AI & Automation
consulting.services.ai.desc: Repetitive tasks, manual reporting, scattered information: these are hours your team shouldn't be spending. I audit and map your workflows, identify what can be cut and automated, and help you build the pipelines that give that time back.
consulting.services.ai.li3: AI agent setup (research, summarization, backlog generation)
consulting.process.title: How it works
consulting.process.step1.title: Discovery call
consulting.process.step1.desc: 15 minutes to understand your project, context and priorities. No commitment, no pitch. We figure out together whether there's a fit.
consulting.process.step2.title: Clear proposal
consulting.process.step2.desc: A scoped plan lands in your inbox within 48 hours — deliverables, timeline, and fixed pricing. No surprises.
consulting.process.step3.title: Delivery and iteration
consulting.process.step3.desc: Short cycles, regular check-ins. You see progress early and can course-correct before anything gets locked in.
consulting.about.title: David Flórez Herrero
consulting.about.p1: Most studios don't struggle at making games. They struggle at the infrastructure around them: the pipelines, the handoffs, the scope creep that quietly kills timelines, and the localization that gets bolted on a month before launch. That's the problem I solve.
consulting.about.p2: I've managed global localization operations at Blizzard Entertainment (15 languages, 100+ contributors, multimillion-euro budgets) and driven Agile transformation at Equinox on the sim-ship launch of Altered TCG across Board Game Arena and physical retail (1.75M players). I know what good delivery infrastructure looks like, and I know exactly where it tends to break.
consulting.about.p3: Today I work with small to mid-size studios that are past the prototype stage and starting to feel the friction of scaling — teams where one clearer process or one smarter pipeline makes a measurable difference.
consulting.about.p4: Remote-first. Based in Vigo, Spain. Available globally.
consulting.work.title: Past work
consulting.work.lead: A selection of real engagements. More detail available on request.
consulting.work.case1.title: Agile Transformation — Equinox (Altered TCG)
consulting.work.case1.desc: Managed delivery of the Altered TCG digital adaptation on Board Game Arena, including a Scrum-to-Kanban transition that improved KPI compliance by 30%. Served as Product Owner across the Altered app and site, managing design and dev teams through a sim-ship physical and digital launch.
consulting.work.case2.title: Global Localization Pipeline — Blizzard Entertainment
consulting.work.case2.desc: Led localization delivery across several Blizzard titles and platforms — managing delivery across 15 languages, coordinating 100+ internal and external contributors, and overseeing multimillion-euro budgets. Drove global pipeline improvement initiatives including tools migration and implementation of new operational roles.
consulting.work.case3.title: LocFlow - Bad Idea Int. Automation Pipeline
consulting.work.case3.desc: A pipeline that handles extraction, formatting, delivery and re-import — and plugs in AI translation, your own LLM, or a human vendor at whichever stage makes sense for your project.
consulting.book.title: Let's talk
consulting.book.desc: 15 minutes. No commitment. Tell me what you're working on and we'll see if I can help.
